installCommand: cd backend && npm install && cd ../citizen-portal && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && cd ../official-portal && npm install --legacy-peer-deps
buildCommand: cd citizen-portal && npm run build && cd ../official-portal && npm run build && cd .. && mkdir -p output && cp -r citizen-portal/dist/* output/ && mkdir -p output/official && cp -r official-portal/dist/* output/official/
